es.actionBar.handTool: Hand Tool (h) - pan and rotate the view without selecting objects
es.actionBar.rotateTool: Rotate Tool (e) - Select and rotate objects
es.actionBar.rulerTool: Ruler Tool (r) - Measure distances between points
es.actionBar.translateTool: Translate Tool (w) - Select and move objects
es.addLayer.onlyFirstFileAdded: Only the first file was added. Drop one file at a time.
es.addLayer.unsupportedFileType: Unsupported file type: {fileName}. Supported formats: GLB, GLTF, JPG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, PLY, SPLAT, SPZ.
es.appMenu.export.gltfError: Error while trying to save glTF file. Error: {error}
es.appMenu.export.uvTransformSkipped: UV transformation skipped - using original export
es.appMenu.geojson.importSuccess: GeoJSON file imported successfully. Found {count} polygon features.
es.appMenu.geojson.largeFileWarning: GeoJSON file is {sizeKB}KB. Large files may affect performance.
es.appMenu.geojson.parseError: Error parsing GeoJSON file. Please ensure it is valid JSON.
es.common.useGeoTokensTooltip: Use geo tokens to set or change a geolocation for your scene.
es.deploymentBanner.message: You're using a forked or self-hosted build of 3DStreet (open source, AGPL-3.0). Local editing works, but cloud features are unavailable. To use cloud services, visit <link>3dstreet.app</link>.
es.editorUpgradeModal.alreadyPro: You're already a Pro member — try that action again to continue.
es.geoModal.geojsonTipBeta: This feature is in beta please join our {discordLink} to provide feedback
es.geoModal.geojsonTipDetected: We've detected geographic coordinates from your imported GeoJSON data
es.geoModal.geojsonTipMarker: The red marker shows the calculated center of your imported buildings
es.geoModal.geojsonTipSetLocation: Click 'Set Location' to position your scene at this location
es.geoModal.outOfTokensProIncludes: Pro includes unlimited geo lookups, map access, and more
es.geoModal.outOfTokensSetChange: Set and change scene locations as often as you need
es.geoModal.outOfTokensUpgrade: Upgrade to 3DStreet Pro for unlimited geospatial features
es.geoModal.outOfTokensUsedAll: You've used all your free geo tokens
es.geoModal.setLocationFailed: Failed to set scene location. Please try again.
es.geoModal.tipChoosePoint: Choose a point that is easy to identify visually from aerial view such as utility pole, road marking, crosswalk ramp, or other landmark
es.geoModal.tipClickMap: Click on the map to change the location of the red marker point
es.geoModal.tipMarkerOrigin: The red marker sets the geospatial location for the centerpoint origin of the scene
es.geoModal.tipZoomIn: Zoom in as much as possible when placing point to ensure accurate scene alignment
es.geoModal.upgradeToChangeLocation: Upgrade to Pro to Change Location
es.geoModal.upgradeUnlimitedAccess: Upgrade to Pro for unlimited access
es.geoSidebar.dropSceneCopy: Drop your scene onto real-world maps with 3D buildings, terrain, and satellite imagery.
es.geoSidebar.outOfTokens: You're out of free geo tokens.
es.geoSidebar.savedLocation: This scene has a saved location. Add the geo layer to load 3D buildings, terrain, and satellite imagery.
es.geoSidebar.savedLocationWithSource: This scene has a saved location {sourcePhrase}. Add the geo layer to load 3D buildings, terrain, and satellite imagery.
es.geoSidebar.upgradeForLookups: Upgrade to Pro for unlimited geo lookups
es.geoSidebar.usesFreeTokens: Uses 1 of {geoToken} free geo tokens to add real-world map data.
es.help.action.modeSwitch.description: To switch between the "View" and "Edit" modes, click the button in the upper right corner.
es.help.action.modeSwitch.title: Mode switch
es.help.action.moveMap.description: Click and drag to pan the map view.
es.help.action.moveMap.title: Move the map by dragging
es.help.action.rotateMap.description: Right-click and drag to rotate the map while staying in place.
es.help.action.rotateMap.title: Rotate the map by right-clicking and dragging
es.help.action.zoomMap.description: Use the mouse scrollwheel (or touchpad scrolling motion) to zoom in and out.
es.help.action.zoomMap.title: Zoom the map by scrolling
es.jobHealthModal.adminsOnly: Admins only. Sign in with an admin account to view background-job health.
es.jobHealthModal.footerNote: Heartbeats are written on each scheduled run. A red row that says “stale” means the schedule isn’t firing. Expand a row to copy its summary/error for diagnosis.
es.jobHealthModal.title: System Health
es.modalTextures.loadFromSources: Load a new texture from one of these sources:
es.modalTextures.nameTaken: Name already taken by another asset or entity
es.modalTextures.title: Textures
es.newModal.aiAssistant.description: Get help building your scene with AI
es.newModal.aiAssistant.title: Create with AI assistant
es.newModal.aiGenerator.title: AI Image Generator
es.newModal.basicStreet.description: Start with a pre-configured street template
es.newModal.basicStreet.title: Create a basic street
es.newModal.geolocation.description: Start with maps and real-world context
es.newModal.geolocation.title: Create from geolocation
es.newModal.intersection.title: Create intersection
es.newModal.streetmix.title: Import from Streetmix
es.newModal.title: Create a New Scene
es.primaryToolbar.snapshotTitle: Capture screenshot and generate rendered images
es.profileModal.title: 3DStreet Account
es.sceneGraph.emptyStateMessage: Add a new layer to get started.
es.scenesModal.loadError: Error trying to load 3DStreet scene from cloud. Error: Scene data is undefined or invalid.
es.scenesModal.signInPrompt: To view your scenes you have to sign in:
es.scenesModal.title: Open scene
es.screenshotModal.aiRenderCompleteGenToken: AI render complete! {remainingTokens} gen tokens remaining. ({modelName})
es.screenshotModal.aiRenderFailed: Failed to generate AI render for {modelName}. Please try again.
es.screenshotModal.confirmClose: Rendering in progress. Are you sure you want to close? The render will be cancelled.
es.screenshotModal.insufficientTokens4x: You need at least {totalTokenCost} tokens for 4x render
es.screenshotModal.loginPrompt: Please log in to use AI rendering
es.screenshotModal.onlyAuthorCanSetThumbnai: Only the scene author can set the thumbnail
es.screenshotModal.thumbnailFailed: Failed to set scene thumbnail. Please try again.
es.screenshotModal.title: Screenshot & Render
es.screenshotModal.upgradeToPro: Upgrade to Pro to hide 3DStreet Free watermark
es.shareModal.discordError: Failed to share scene to Discord. Please try again.
es.shareModal.discordTooltip: Post this scene to the 3DStreet Discord server to share with other creators
es.shareModal.emailBody: I wanted to share this 3DStreet scene with you: Title: {sceneTitle} Created by: @{authorName} Location: {location} View scene: {shareUrl}
es.shareModal.emailTooltip: Share scene as a new email draft
es.shareModal.osShareTooltip: Use your browser's share feature to send your scene to others
es.shareModal.saveToShare: Please save your scene to share it
es.shareModal.signInToShare: Please sign in to share your scene
es.shareModal.title: Share Scene
es.shareModal.webShareUnsupported: Web Share API is not supported in this browser
es.sidebar.selectObject: Select an object to edit properties.
es.signInModal.message: Sign in to save and share scenes.
es.userLayers.tipContain: User Layers contain all objects you add to your scene
es.userLayers.tipRename: Rename layers by clicking on the layer, then the Rename button in the right-hand properties panel
es.userLayers.tipVisibility: Toggle layer visibility by using the switch on the left on each row of the layers panel
